question: PT6A 装配中，「Compressor turbine vane ring」与哪些零件存在配合或连接关系？
gold_answer: 配合零件：No. 2 Bearing Cover、Outer ring、Inner ring、Shroud segment、Compressor turbine vanes。 Compressor turbine vane ring 的作用：Stator vane ring assembly of compressor turbine section
question_en: In PT6A assembly, which parts are mated or connected with the 'Compressor turbine vane ring'?
gold_answer_en: Mated parts: No. 2 Bearing Cover, Outer ring, Inner ring, Shroud segment, Compressor turbine vanes. Function of Compressor turbine vane ring: Stator vane ring assembly of compressor turbine section.

question: PT6A 装配中，「Power Turbine Blade」与哪些零件存在配合或连接关系？
gold_answer: 配合零件：Turbine Disk。 Power Turbine Blade 的作用：Blades of the power turbine that extract energy from expanding gases
question_en: In PT6A assembly, which parts are mated or connected with the 'Power Turbine Blade'?
gold_answer_en: Mated parts: Turbine Disk. Function of Power Turbine Blade: Blades of the power turbine that extract energy from expanding gases.

question: PT6A 装配中，「Remove nuts, washers and bolts securing ring halves and vane…」涉及哪些主要装配/检查工序？
gold_answer: 涉及工序：Bolt (1)；Vane Segment Strip (2)；Gas Generator Case (3)；Fireseal Mount Ring, Top Half (4)；Washer (5)。

gold_answer_en: Procedures involved: Bolt (1); Vane Segment Strip (2); Gas Generator Case (3); Fireseal Mount Ring, Top Half (4); Washer (5).

question: PT6A 装配中，「Vane ring」与哪些零件存在配合或连接关系？
gold_answer: 配合零件：No.2 bearing cover。 Vane ring 的作用：叶环，定子叶片环，用于引导气流
question_en: In PT6A assembly, which parts are mated or connected with the 'Vane ring'?
gold_answer_en: Mated parts: No.2 bearing cover. Function of Vane ring: Vane ring, stator vane ring, used for guiding airflow.

question: PT6A 装配中，「Shroud segment」与哪些零件存在配合或连接关系？
gold_answer: 配合零件：Rotor shaft、Compressor turbine vane ring。 Shroud segment 的作用：护罩分段件，用于环绕涡轮叶片形成气封通道
question_en: In PT6A assembly, which parts are mated or connected with the 'Shroud segment'?
gold_answer_en: Mated parts: Rotor shaft, Compressor turbine vane ring. Function of Shroud segment: Hood segment, used for surrounding turbine blades to form air seal passage.

question: PT6A 装配中，「Fuel Control Unit」与哪些零件存在配合或连接关系？
gold_answer: 配合零件：Propeller Governor [BOM:8210-210A]、Rear Pneumatic Line。 Fuel Control Unit 的作用：Engine fuel system component controlling fuel flow to the engine

gold_answer_en: Mated parts: Propeller Governor [BOM:8210-210A], Rear Pneumatic Line. Function of Fuel Control Unit: Engine fuel system component controlling fuel flow to the engine.

question: PT6A 装配中，「Oil Drain Tube Assembly 3032093」与哪些零件存在配合或连接关系？
gold_answer: 配合零件：Elbow MS9194-06、Nut MS9100-06、Back-up Ring MS9058-06、Retaining Ring 3101348-01、Bolt MS9500-06。 Oil Drain Tube Assembly 3032093 的作用：油液排放管组件，用于将螺旋桨调速器油液排放到齿轮箱
question_en: In PT6A assembly, which parts are mated or connected with the 'Oil Drain Tube Assembly 3032093'?
gold_answer_en: Mated parts: Elbow MS9194-06, Nut MS9100-06, Back-up Ring MS9058-06, Retaining Ring 3101348-01, Bolt MS9500-06. Function of Oil Drain Tube Assembly 3032093: Oil drain tube assembly, used for draining propeller governor oil into the gearbox.

gold_answer_en: Associated parts: Accessory gearbox, Fuel control unit (FCU), Oil-to-fuel heater. The function of the Engine-driven fuel pump: Positive displacement gear-type pump mounted on accessory gearbox, delivers fuel to FCU
